--- title: You have scheduled your NeptunysForm account for deletion ---

We've received the request to delete your NeptunysForm account. Our system will permanently delete all of your data, including but not limited to account, workspaces, projects, forms and submissions in 48 hours.

The deletion was requested by {fullName} ({email}).

Having a second thought? Please login to your NeptunysForm account and select the option to Cancel scheduled deletion. You must do this within 48 hours of the request to prevent permanent data loss.

NB: Your decision is final. NeptunysForm will not be able to recover your data after deletion.
